description: Produces three auction-themed playground prompts exercising get() cross-document checks.
notes: Grounded in the playground-prompts skill: a well-shaped prompt is 30-50 words, names a bounded domain, two collections + a relationship, a security boundary, and a verifiable-by-violation rule constraint. Success here is that the assistant text references the load-bearing capability words (`get`, `highest bid`, `bid`, `auction`) and produces multiple variants. Falls back to `report-mentions/all-of` until a richer prompt-shape scoring spec lands.
prompt: Generate three short playground prompts in the 30-50 word range that exercise Firestore get() cross-document checks against the current highest bid on an auction listing. Each prompt should name the two collections involved and describe what the rule rejects.
